name: atlas
description: Automated content pipeline: signals → insights → drafts → published posts

scripts.dev:backend: npx --yes concurrently -n orchestrator,brain,ingestor,publisher,transcriber -c blue,yellow,magenta,green,cyan "tsx --env-file=.env apps/orchestrator/src/index.ts" "tsx --env-file=.env apps/content-brain/src/index.ts" "tsx --env-file=.env apps/feed-ingestor/src/index.ts" "tsx --env-file=.env apps/publisher/src/worker.ts" "tsx --env-file=.env apps/transcriber/src/index.ts"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist
scripts.clean:dev: pgrep -f 'tsx.*src/index.ts' | xargs -r kill -9 || echo 'No orphaned workers found'
